title.en: The Stone Dragon Demon Lord proposed.

content.en:
"Lord of Blood Spirits, according to my investigation, the Golden Phoenix Bird encountered in this direction is the weakest, and we will break through from this side. "

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord proposed.

"Okay, then go in this direction!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit nodded.

Whew!!

They quickly shuttled in this direction, and soon came to the location of the golden phoenix bird.

Rumble!!!

The Golden Phoenix Bird appeared, and the terrifying aura made the Stone Dragon Demon Lord's face change drastically.

He fought with the Golden Phoenix Bird many times, but each time he was defeated, and he couldn't escape, and was easily killed by the other party.

"I didn't expect such a powerful Extreme Dao creature to have no wisdom, it's not normal here!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit muttered.

Bang!!!

The two sides have fought each other!

The Lord of the Blood Spirit fought with the Golden Phoenix Bird, and he fell into disadvantage in an instant.

Can't beat it!

Seeing this, the Lord of the Blood Spirit was also shocked by the strength of this Golden Phoenix Bird, but he was still sure to get rid of the Golden Phoenix Bird, so he didn't worry too much.

The Lord of the Blood Spirit joined forces with the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and walked while fighting with the Golden Phoenix Bird, and soon left this area.

Suddenly.

The Lord of the Blood Spirit and the Lord of the Stone Dragon Demon found that the Golden Phoenix Bird was no longer chasing them.

"It seems that the Extreme Dao creatures here have a sense of territory, so they have given up chasing us!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said with a sigh of relief.

"Let's go, keep going, I hope you won't encounter more powerful Extreme Path creatures!"

The Lord of the Blood Spirit.

"There shouldn't be any more powerful Extreme Path creatures, after all, it's just a treasure land, and there can't be too many Extreme Path creatures. The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

Next, they continue to shuttle.

But soon, they realized that something was wrong.

This treasure seems to be too big, and after shuttling for a long time, there is no end to it.

Suddenly, they came to a ruined land, that is, the Sea of Heavenly Ruins.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord quickly grabbed a descendant of an Extreme Creature and immediately inquired about the news from its mouth.

Soon, the news of the investigation from here made their faces change.

"This is the !! of the deep sea"

The Blood Spirit Lord's face changed drastically.

"What is the Extreme Deep Sea?" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord asked curiously.

The Lord of the Blood Spirit introduced, "Stone Dragon Demon Lord, you haven't been in contact with those Three Realms Perfect Controllers, so you don't know much about the Extreme Dao Deep Sea. However, you should have heard of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, there is an Extreme Dao Source Sea on the Extreme Dao Mountain of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, and the Extreme Dao Source Sea is a space-time area opened up by the forces of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, where many Extreme Dao creatures have been bred, many of which are comparable to those of us who are super perfect controllers. And the Extreme Dao Deep Sea is even more powerful and terrifying, there are too many Extreme Dao creatures here that are comparable to the perfect controllers of the Super Realm, and there are also many Extreme Dao creatures that are comparable to the perfect controllers of the Three Realms. It can be said that some of the Extreme Creatures here have many Super Perfect Controllers under their own command, and the number is more than the top power of the Eternal Ruins. Compared to the Extreme Deep Sea, the Ruins of Eternity are all ants. The Extreme Deep Sea corresponds to the end of the entire realm!!"

"The Extreme Dao Deep Sea is so powerful, I actually regarded it as a treasure land, and it turned out to be a place comparable to the end of the realm. The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was also shocked.

But soon, he excitedly said, "Then there must be a lot of treasures here!"

"Many, almost all of the Extreme Path creatures were born in the Extreme Deep Sea. However, this place is too dangerous for cultivators!" the Blood Spirit Lord frowned.

"Let's be careful!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord secretly.

"Extreme Dao creatures are very hostile to cultivators, if we contain the bloodline of Extreme Dao creatures, it is okay to say, but we are not descendants of Extreme Dao creatures, and it is difficult to move an inch here!" The Lord of Blood Spirit said helplessly: "Even the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm does not dare to enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea at will." Of course, it is difficult for those who are perfect controllers of the Three Realms to find a way to enter the Extreme Deep Sea, Stone Dragon Demon Lord, I have to say that you are lucky to have found a secret passage to enter the Extreme Deep Sea, but we don't have that kind of strength. Of course, we can look for resources around here, and we can't continue to go deeper, otherwise once we are discovered by a super perfect controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, if we report it, there will definitely be an Extreme Dao creature comparable to the perfect controller of the Three Realms to hunt us down. "

"Okay, let's stay around here, no more depth!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord nodded repeatedly.

......

No Road Tower.

On this day, the feast of Ye Tian becoming the fourteenth tower master began, and many super perfect controllers came to participate in the feast one by one, congratulating the Wudao Tower on the birth of a new tower master.

Top forces such as the Xuannu, the Boundless Chamber of Commerce, and the Space-Time Exchange all sent the perfect controllers of the Void Realm to show their importance to the Wudao Tower and Ye Tian.

Of course, there are also a few top forces that have a similar relationship with the Wudao Tower, so they just congratulated them from afar, and did not send anyone here.

In this regard, the Wudao Tower did not care.

The scale of this feast was unprecedented, and a large number of perfect masters, half-step perfect masters, and countless eternal masters all participated in the feast, and this feast enveloped the area of the endless realm.

And this feast was also held for many years, and this was the end of it completely.

Through this feast, those low-level cultivators also knew about Ye Tian's existence, so that Ye Tian's reputation was known to those low-level cultivators.

After this feast, Ye Tian officially had the authority of the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower, such as being able to mobilize the power of a large part of the Wudao Tower and mobilize many perfect controllers of the Wudao Tower, and he could interfere in many things.

In addition, Ye Tian also enjoyed a lot of resources, such as the Daoless Pagoda mastered a lot of precious resources, and some even had a huge effect on the super perfect controller, he could enjoy it.

But what Ye Tian cares about most is some secrets, real secrets that only the tower master is qualified to know.

Daoless Tower, the core of time and space.

Ye Tian came here, there are many precious secret materials hidden here, and the Lord of Time accompanied Ye Tian here, casually explaining some situations to him.

"Lord of Time, is there a secret here about the Extreme Deep Sea?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Lord, you actually know the Extreme Deep Sea?" the Lord of Time was shocked.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian is unlikely to have come into contact with the Extreme Dao Deep Sea before.

"There are some chances that happen to know the deep sea of the Pole Road. Ye Tian said casually.

The Lord of Time didn't ask much, but pointed to an area and said, "The information in this area is a record of the Extreme Deep Sea, you can browse it slowly." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately went to browse the information about the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.
